name: @theaiinc/realm
description: Realm — isolated AI execution environment platform

scripts.build: pnpm -r --filter='./packages/*' exec npx tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean || true && cd packages/realm-api && npx tsup src/server.ts --format esm --clean && cd ../../packages/realm-cli && npx tsup src/cli.ts --format esm --clean
scripts.test: cd packages/realm-core && npx vitest run && cd ../../packages/realm-container && npx vitest run && cd ../../packages/realm-browser && npx vitest run && cd ../../packages/realm-veil && npx vitest run
